title: Payment of salaries of jury commission's clerks
doc_html:
§3103.  Payment of salaries of jury commission's clerks

The salaries set forth in R.S. 13:3102 may be paid by the city of New Orleans semi-monthly.
doc_text:
§3103.  Payment of salaries of jury commission's clerks
The salaries set forth in R.S. 13:3102 may be paid by the city of New Orleans semi-monthly.
